provider: CUHK Department of Sports Science and Physical Education PESHN Programme A Study Scheme
note: Only Programme A for students admitted in 2026-27 and thereafter is included. Bracketed SPED3201 and SPED2201 are historical codes for SPED3400 and SPED4400 and are not stored as separate courses. Hash and asterisk markers are not part of course codes. No Year or Semester is inferred.
